summary.en: Current USD liquidity is in a neutral-tight state, but there are positive signals of a medium-term pivot.
summary.zh: 当前美元流动性处于中性偏紧状态，但中期存在转向（Pivot）的积极信号。

rrp_note.zh: 已基本耗尽（一年前为 547 亿美元）

tga_note.en: Rising fast due to tax season, expected to reach $1.025T near tax day
tga_note.zh: 受税季影响快速攀升，预计报税日附近达 1.025 万亿美元

details.en: Quantitative Tightening (QT) ended in December 2025, and the Fed has begun purchasing T-bills, with the first $40.5B injection scheduled for April 16. Overnight Reverse Repo (RRP) balances are nearly depleted, eliminating the RRP liquidity buffer. Due to tax season, TGA balances are rising rapidly, creating short-term liquidity headwinds for markets.
details.zh: 量化紧缩（QT）已于 2025 年 12 月结束，美联储正开始购买短期国债（T-bills），首批 405 亿美元的注入计划于 4 月 16 日启动。隔夜逆回购（RRP）余额已基本耗尽，RRP 作为流动性缓冲的作用已经消失。受税季影响，TGA 余额正在快速攀升，短期内市场将面临流动性抽水的逆风。

reason.en: Net liquidity is suppressed short-term by rising TGA, and the RRP buffer is depleted. However, the Fed ending QT and beginning T-bill purchases is a clear pivot signal. Short-term neutral, medium-term bullish.
reason.zh: 净流动性短期受 TGA 攀升压制，RRP 缓冲耗尽。但美联储结束 QT 并开始购买 T-bills 是明确的转向信号。短期中性，中期偏多。

reason.en: Q1 earnings estimates growing at 13.2%, with early reports showing 78% of companies beating expectations by an average of 14.3%. Forward EPS continues to be revised upward; consensus has not fully priced this in.
reason.zh: Q1 盈利预估增长 13.2%，早期财报显示 78% 的公司盈利超预期，平均幅度达 14.3%。前瞻 EPS 持续上修，共识尚未完全定价。

reason.en: The 10-day A/D Line hit its highest since last July, but only 54.87% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day moving average. Indices are making new highs with breadth below 60%, indicating concentrated mega-cap tech leadership.
reason.zh: 10 日涨跌线（A/D Line）创去年 7 月以来新高，但标普 500 位于 200 日均线以上的股票比例仅为 54.87%。指数创新高但广度不足 60%，显示出科技大盘股集中驱动的特征。

reason.en: Earnings season just started with no clear 'beat-and-sell' divergence yet. Bank earnings were strong and stocks rallied accordingly — signals are normal.
reason.zh: 财报季刚开始，尚未出现明显的'盈利超预期但股价下跌'的背离现象。银行股财报强劲且股价上涨，信号正常。

trading_summary.en:
Liquidity is draining — TGA is sucking out funds and RRP is empty. The Fed buying T-bills is good news, but it won't help fast enough. This is not a fat pitch. Score 64, standard position, 50-69%. No adding — wait for a catalyst.

Earnings are strong, analysts are playing catch-up, and that's positive. But look at breadth — Nasdaq up 11 straight days, S&P at all-time highs, yet only 55% of stocks are above their 200-day MA. This is a narrow mega-cap rally, not a broad bull market. No beat-and-sell divergence yet, but stay vigilant.
trading_summary.zh:
流动性在抽水，TGA 正在吸走资金，RRP 已经空了。美联储买短债是好消息，但远水解不了近渴。这不是 fat pitch。64分，标准仓位，50-69%。不加码，等催化剂。

盈利很强，分析师在追赶，这是好事。但看看广度——纳斯达克连涨 11 天，标普创新高，但只有 55% 的股票在 200 日均线以上。这是少数大盘股在拉升，不是全面牛市。目前还没看到盈利好却被抛售的背离，但要盯紧。

trading_quote: It's liquidity that moves markets, not earnings.

note.zh: 创历史新高，连续 11 天站上 24000
表现落后，反映市场广度问题
收益率曲线呈正斜率 (+51.7 bps)
测试关键支撑位，处于 6 周低点

note.en: Near all-time highs, safe-haven demand persists
note.zh: 维持在历史高位附近，避险需求仍在
包含约 $20 的地缘政治供应溢价
在 $75,000 阻力位附近盘整

note.en: BTC is consolidating near the $75,000 resistance level. Exchange net outflows suggest holders are moving coins to cold storage, a bullish accumulation signal. The Fear & Greed Index at 62 indicates moderate greed — not yet overheated. Key level to watch: a breakout above $76,500 could trigger momentum toward $80K.
note.zh: BTC 在 $75,000 阻力位附近盘整。交易所净流出表明持有者正在将币转移至冷钱包，这是看涨的积累信号。恐惧贪婪指数 62 表示适度贪婪——尚未过热。关键关注位：突破 $76,500 可能触发向 $80K 的动能。

gold_silver_note.zh: 偏高——白银表现落后，历史上会均值回归

driver_note.en: Central bank buying + geopolitical risk premium
driver_note.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险溢价

note.en: Gold remains near all-time highs, supported by persistent central bank buying (China, India, Turkey) and elevated geopolitical risk. The gold/silver ratio at 88.3 is historically stretched, suggesting silver may outperform in a catch-up rally. Real yields remain a headwind at current levels, but safe-haven flows are dominating.
note.zh: 黄金维持在历史高位附近，受到央行持续购金（中国、印度、土耳其）和地缘政治风险升高的支撑。金银比 88.3 处于历史高位，暗示白银可能在追赶行情中表现更优。实际收益率在当前水平仍构成逆风，但避险资金流正在主导行情。

description.en: As U.S. tax day approaches, TGA balances are expected to surge above $1 trillion. With RRP already at zero, this will drain liquidity directly from bank reserves, potentially triggering short-term market volatility.
description.zh: 随着美国报税日的到来，TGA 账户余额预计将激增至 1 万亿美元以上。在 RRP 已经归零的情况下，这将直接从银行准备金中抽取流动性，可能引发短期市场波动。

description.en: S&P 500 and Nasdaq are making new highs, but the Dow is declining and only 54.87% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day MA. This narrow rally driven by a handful of mega-cap tech stocks is structurally fragile.
description.zh: 标普 500 和纳斯达克指数屡创新高，但道琼斯指数下跌，且标普 500 中仅有 54.87% 的股票位于 200 日均线以上。这种由少数科技巨头驱动的上涨结构较为脆弱。

description.en: Despite ongoing Middle East ceasefire negotiations, crude oil remains above $91. Rising energy prices could pass through to core inflation within 3-6 months, constraining the Fed's ability to cut rates.
description.zh: 虽然中东停火谈判正在进行，但原油价格仍维持在 91 美元上方。能源价格的上涨可能在 3-6 个月内传导至核心通胀，从而限制美联储的降息空间。

description.en: Earnings season has just begun. Early reporters among financial giants (e.g., Bank of America, Morgan Stanley) saw stock price gains after beating expectations. No 'beat-and-sell' divergence — the 6-month bad-news warning signal — has been observed. We will continue to closely monitor price reactions following mega-cap tech earnings.
description.zh: 目前财报季刚刚拉开帷幕，首批公布财报的金融巨头（如美国银行和摩根士丹利）在业绩超预期后股价均录得上涨，尚未观察到'盈利超预期但股价下跌'的 6 个月坏消息预警信号。我们将继续密切监控科技巨头财报发布后的价格反应。

disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / FMP / MarketPulse。仅供研究，非投资建议。
